name: harness-marketplace
description: Claude Code skills and plugins for security work within Totara

plugins.name: sra-plugin
plugins.description: Produce Security Risk Assessment reports for Totara features and changes. Use this when assessing whether a feature needs further security assessment, threat modelling, security team involvement, or stakeholder notification.

plugins.name: sast-plugin
plugins.description: A comprehensive **Static Application Security Testing (SAST)** plugin for Totara LMS providing multi-lens security analysis.

plugins.name: msa-review
plugins.description: Triage Moodle Security Advisories against the Totara codebase and produce a patch-decision table.
